overall.description: A cinematic traversal through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077 during a rainy night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and futuristic urban architecture. The camera moves from elevated highways through narrow urban canyons and plazas, ending at the Night City MedCenter entrance.

events.description: descends from elevated highway ramp to street level

agents.ego_description: navigating elevated highway while observing the neon-lit Night City skyline in the rain

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated NC logo at the top, partially obscured by fog
large monochrome billboard displaying COLA text in bold futuristic font
concrete railing and road surface of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway during a rainy Night City evening, with the iconic NC logo building visible through the haze. The camera descends toward street level, passing a large COLA billboard while neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: transitions from elevated highway to street level driving

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets past illuminated billboards and glass towers

entered.detail: digital billboard displaying firearm advertisement with 2nd AMENDMENT text
illuminated signage for EL FLAMENCO establishment
modern glass facade building with grid-patterned illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera moves through the rain-slicked downtown streets, passing the 2nd Amendment billboard and El Flamenco signage. Glass office towers with illuminated windows line the route as the elevated highway recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass and urban canyon with news signage

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath highway infrastructure
passes bright pink Naranji billboard casting colored light on surroundings

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow urban canyons and underpasses beneath concrete overpasses

entered.detail: blue illuminated signage for WNS NEWS media outlet
vertical pink neon billboard displaying FEEL THE CHEMISTRY with stylized face
massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The route enters a narrow urban canyon beneath massive concrete overpasses, sheltered from the rain. WNS News signs and the bright pink Naranji chemistry billboard illuminate the confined space as the camera weaves between support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: exits underpass into open plaza area with benches
slows and tilts upward to view the Fuyutsuki tower facade

agents.ego_description: moving through the plaza and observing the towering Fuyutsuki building with red neon signage

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with prominent red neon FUYUTSUKI signage near the top
concrete seating arrangements in the open plaza space
illuminated advertisement for Broseph Brewing company

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into an open plaza, the camera reveals the imposing Fuyutsuki tower with its distinctive red neon signage. The scene opens up to show benches and open space at ground level, surrounded by towering corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with vertical advertisements

events.description: returns to street driving from plaza area
passes sparse vehicle traffic on the wet multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: driving through neon corridors passing MIXIT UP and HEYON advertisements

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying MIXIT UP 16 with stylized figure
advertisement showing REAL WATER text with beverage imagery
tall vertical purple neon sign with HEYON text

segments.scene_description: Back in motion along the city streets, the camera passes vertical neon advertisements including MIXIT UP and HEYON signs. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights as sparse traffic moves through the corridor, with the Fuyutsuki tower receding behind.

events.description: approaches and enters the Night City MedCenter building
transitions from neon outdoor lighting to fluorescent indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the MedCenter entrance and moving into the illuminated corridor

entered.detail: wall-mounted signage with red cross symbol and Night City MedCenter text
dark wall with teal horizontal stripe and fluorescent lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The journey concludes as the camera approaches the Night City MedCenter, entering the building's corridor. The transition from the rain-soaked neon streets to the artificially lit interior marks the end of the traversal, with the MedCenter's distinctive red cross signage and teal wall stripes coming into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the heights of a rainy highway down into the neon-drenched depths of the city, eventually transitioning into a sterile medical facility. It begins by descending from an elevated highway past the NC logo and a large COLA billboard, moving toward the rain-slicked downtown streets where glass office towers and El Flamenco signage line the route. The camera then weaves through a narrow urban canyon beneath concrete overpasses, passing WNS News and Naranji chemistry signs before emerging into an open plaza dominated by the red neon of the Fuyutsuki tower. As the movement continues along wet asphalt reflecting MIXIT UP and HEYON advertisements, the city skyline recedes to make way for the final approach. The journey concludes as the camera leaves the rain-soaked streets to enter the artificially lit corridor of the Night City MedCenter, marked by teal wall stripes and red cross signage.
